# terrible_netapp_eseries_santricity_netapp_e_volume_copy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_password` (String) The password to authenticate with the SANtricity WebServices Proxy or embedded REST API.
- `api_url` (String) The url to the SANtricity WebServices Proxy or embedded REST API, for example `https://prod-1.wahoo.acme.com/devmgr/v2`.
- `api_username` (String) The username to authenticate with the SANtricity WebServices Proxy or embedded REST API.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `state` (String) Whether the specified volume copy pair should exist or not.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `copy_priority` (Number) Copy priority level
- `create_copy_pair_if_does_not_exist` (Boolean) Defines if a copy pair will be created if it does not exist. If set to True destination_volume_id and source_volume_id are required.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `destination_volume_id` (String) The id of the volume copy destination. If used, must be paired with source_volume_id Mutually exclusive with volume_copy_pair_id, and search_volume_id
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `onlineCopy` (Boolean) Whether copy should be online
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `search_volume_id` (String) Searches for all valid potential target and source volumes that could be used in a copy_pair Mutually exclusive with volume_copy_pair_id, destination_volume_id and source_volume_id
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `source_volume_id` (String) The id of the volume copy source. If used, must be paired with destination_volume_id Mutually exclusive with volume_copy_pair_id, and search_volume_id
- `ssid` (String) Storage system identifier
- `start_stop_copy` (String) starts a re-copy or stops a copy in progress Note: If you stop the initial file copy before it it done the copy pair will be destroyed Requires volume_copy_pair_id
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `targetWriteProtected` (Boolean) Whether target should be write protected
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Should https certificates be validated?
- `volume_copy_pair_id` (String) The id of a given volume copy pair Mutually exclusive with destination_volume_id, source_volume_id, and search_volume_id Can use to delete or check presence of volume pairs Must specify this or (destination_volume_id and source_volume_id)

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) Success message
